name: Captain Stu
short_description: Captain Stu is a 2.5d platformer set in the bright and beautiful Caribbean. Defeat enemies with sword or pistol and navigate through the dangerous world.
detailed_description:
Join Captain Stu on his story driven adventures to get his ship and his reputation returned to him. Explore Jamestown Island before heading out into the deep blue sea to battle pirates and monsters, gather abilities along the way and become the great Captain that he once was.

The once great Captain has been called out of retirement to save the people of Jamestown from rogues and bandits. Dragged far and wide in his search for a missing friend, the dangers and action of this platformer will have you on the edge of your seat.

Play as a 2d character in a 3d world, using swords and abilities to defeat the threats of the Pirate world. Fight against seasoned Pirates as well as the undead and an army of cave dwelling creatures.
